in_person: Type with only emojis for the next 5 minutes.
Do 20 pushups right now.

Sing the chorus of your favorite song.
Dance for 30 seconds with no music.

Do your best celebrity impression.
Pretend the floor is lava for 30 seconds.
Recite the alphabet backwards as far as you can.

Do your best evil villain laugh.

Try to juggle three random objects.
Make the funniest face you can and hold it for 20 seconds.

Talk like a pirate until your next turn.

Tell a joke. If nobody laughs, tell another.
Pretend you're a news reporter describing the room.

Moonwalk across the room if you can.

Keep one eye closed until your next turn.
Say the first 20 digits of pi if you know them. If not, make your best guess.
Walk around the room like a penguin.

Do your best dinosaur impression.
Try to whistle your favorite song.

Do your best dramatic movie speech.
Compliment everyone in the room.
Say the alphabet while clapping after every letter.
Pretend to be a game show host.
Do five squats while singing.
Talk without using the letter 'E' until your next turn.
Make up a short rap about someone in the room.

in_person: Take off one non-essential piece of clothing.
Give the person of your choice a sensual massage for 2 minutes.

online: Send a tasteful but risky/suggestive photo to the group.

challenges: 🏆 **CHALLENGE:** For the next 3 rounds, you must start every sentence with 'Daddy/Mommy says...'
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Do a 1-minute plank right now or confess your deepest, darkest secret.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** Give up your next turn to pick. The person to your left chooses whether you do a Truth or Dare, and they pick the spiciness.
🏆 **CHALLENGE:** You are now the 'servant' of the person who went before you. You must do whatever mild task they ask for the next 10 minutes.
penalties: Take a drink (or a big sip of water)!
Post the most embarrassing emoji/sticker you have in general chat.
Let the group choose your Discord nickname for the rest of the game.
Confess an embarrassing secret right now.
Send the last photo saved in your camera roll to the chat (if SFW).
